body_text.content: Once upon a time, in Crow Valley, there lived a little crow named Varis. Varis loved to sing and fly around the forest, but sometimes he felt sad and lonely. One day, he met a wise old Naakka who taught him the importance of being kind to himself.

Pinnistely, hikoilu ja avun pyytäminen voivat ollat merkkejä sinnikkyydestä.

body_text.content:
Whenever Varis felt sad or lonely, he would remind himself of the kind things he had said to himself. He would say, "I am strong and brave, and I can get through this." And before he knew it, he started to feel better.

From that day on, Varis made sure to be kind to himself every day. He knew that by treating himself with kindness, he could be the best version of himself. And whenever he met other birds who felt sad or lonely, he would share his story with them and encourage them to be kind to themselves too.

The end.
